violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Observed fish thawing in sink without water running on it.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed nothing date marked in refrigerator or cold hold unit.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed grease build up in vent hood.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Observed bulb in vent hood with no protective shield.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate.
